{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154653242824D4E1FA8B131941"}"},"total":2265},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7433321936262972185","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还可以哦，世界观还挺大的，算蛮好看的升级流主角了。
比较喜欢的就是主角一直是打脸别人的存在，就没有受过委屈的时候，一直是天之骄子，这点真的很喜欢"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730710140,"group_id":"7322723255318498366","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"主攻偏攻控","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8bh25Acne05Te758FA4tiA=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b255c17deaf547309a06b7231e47f236~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793737&x-signature=33UJjxY9RWDoWHL7cvrgdmwUu0U%3D","user_id":"984794044056135","user_name":"拔萝卜的律界萌兔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"984794044056135","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7322723255318498366","book_info":{"abstract":"(爽文＋系统＋天骄流)
林玄穿越到玄天大陆，成为一方小家族的第一天才。
咦，我的堂弟修为莫名其妙消失，五年后再度崛起？
我敲，感情我是一个炮灰路人甲？
不，这绝对不可能！
林玄望着自己那想要装逼的堂弟嘿嘿一笑，不好意思，堂哥我早就无敌了。
你们都有着气运加身，那我只好开挂了。
惶惶大世，众生争渡，但是却发现，那武道的彼岸有着一袭白衣背对众生。
这一世，是我林玄一个人的大世！
九大天书，上古九秘，万古仙体，他化自在，道火横空...我有着亿万无敌传承，我若不敢言无敌，谁又敢言不败？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c0596289049bfdb2080e83d09d529b66","author":"木得感情的咸鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7322723255318498366","book_name":"刚满十六，系统终于来了","book_short_name":"无敌传承","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7322727322346324542","read_count":"43974","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1003114"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"496","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,诸天万界,天才,无敌,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d1fb23ad460b9ebbb6206e16efbb21c9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436013&x-signature=zxteyVo1zz8sCZcnnfK9gYJbjl4%
